evals.prompt: 我本地装了 ONLYOFFICE，帮我把 /tmp/in.docx 转成 PDF，给我 agent 可直接调用的命令。
evals.expected_output: Uses the skill wrapper command and mentions the output path plus verification.

evals.prompt: 这台机器只有 onlyoffice-desktopeditors，没有 documentbuilder。还可以稳定地命令行转 docx 到 pdf 吗？
evals.expected_output: Explains that the supported local automation path is missing, avoids presenting x2t as the default stable path, and points to the prerequisite clearly.

evals.prompt: 不要用 sudo。给我一个用户级安装方法，让 agent 本地用 ONLYOFFICE 把 docx 转 pdf，并优先走这个路径。
evals.expected_output: Uses the user-level venv installer as the preferred path and points to ~/.local/bin/documentbuilder.
